  "findings": [
    "Missing manual volume balancing dampers at branch takeoffs",
    "Inability to balance airflow to design specifications",
    "Non-compliance with SMACNA standards and project specifications"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install manual volume dampers with locking quadrants at all branch takeoffs as required by SMACNA",
    "Re-engage the Testing, Adjusting, and Balancing (TAB) agency to perform a complete system re-balance",
    "Submit an updated TAB report for engineering approval"
  ],
  "rationale": "The absence of balancing dampers at branch takeoffs makes it impossible to properly balance the HVAC system to meet design airflow requirements. This violates SMACNA standards and project specifications, leading to uneven thermal comfort, system inefficiency, and a failed TAB report in an in-service commercial asset.",

    "SMACNA HVAC Duct Construction Standards",
    "ASHRAE Standard 111",
    "Project TAB Specifications"
  ]
